task: Compose AppShell with listview and side panel regions
input: Build a route-aware app layout that includes optional contextual rails on both sides of main content.

rules: Use AppShell.Listview for left contextual collections.
Use AppShell.SidePanel for right contextual actions, documents, and metadata.

task: Render a provider workbench with left list and right panel
input: User needs a provider assignment workspace with candidate list, detail view, and document actions.

task: Render shell without side panel when context is not needed
input: Dashboard page only needs navigation and main content.

notes: Do not render empty AppShell.SidePanel wrappers.
Preserve AppShell.Main as the only required route surface under AppShell.Content.

task: Describe shell region intent for generated docs
input: Generate implementation notes for AppShell composition.

compoundRegions.name: AppShell.Listview
compoundRegions.intent: Left contextual list for records and queues.

compoundRegions.name: AppShell.SidePanel
compoundRegions.intent: Right contextual panel for detail and secondary workflows.

styling: Use tokenized borders between Listview/Main/SidePanel regions.
Allow Main and side rails to scroll independently.
